Notice Of Motion, Motion In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Judgment Pursuant To Breach Of Stipulation
Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ARNOLD W. EVJE II, TEL. NO. 508-0187 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
MICHAEL LAMAY, TEL. NO. 989-3986. DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MICHAEL LAMAY'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment ENTERED ON MARCH 10, 2009 BASED ON CCP SECTION 473 IS DENIED. THE MOTION WAS NOT FILED WITHIN THE STATUTORY TIME LIMIT, EVEN ASSUMING RELIEF FROM A STIPULATED JUDGMENT IS AVAILABLE UNDER C C P SECTION 473 (B). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Arnold W. Evje, Esq. for plaintiff N.R. Patel, who is also present.
Jessica M. Tankersley, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendant Michael T. Lamay, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case settled. Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation is filed. Trial date vacated.
